tools.name: M365 License Audit
tools.description: Surface inactive license holders and recover unused seats before your next renewal.

tools.name: Group Import
tools.description: Bulk-add users to Entra ID security groups from CSV — with dry-run preview and audit log.

tools.name: MFA Status Report
tools.description: Audit MFA coverage across your tenant and surface users with weak or missing auth methods.

tools.name: Guest Access Audit
tools.description: Identify stale B2B guest accounts — review last sign-in, group memberships, and license exposure across your tenant.

tools.name: License Spend
tools.description: Analyze M365 license costs by SKU and department, identify inactive seat waste, and model 12-month budget scenarios.
